nodes.label: AI as data analysis assistant for pattern identification
nodes.grounding_span: I do find AI helpful when looking at what is selling at what time of day

nodes.label: Human control over critical decisions
nodes.grounding_span: I would prefer to do all of my ordering myself

nodes.label: AI requiring context explanation
nodes.grounding_span: the system sometimes doesn't understand case counts

nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.label_negative: AI as crutch hindering critical thinking
nodes.grounding_span: I see a huge value in AI in helping to boost creativity

nodes.label: AI transparency and reproducibility
nodes.grounding_span: When you get a restock list that tells you to put 2 out of something it shows you only have 1 of, you start to wonder who is running the thing

nodes.label: Autonomy and personal control
nodes.grounding_span: It is comforting to have that control

nodes.label: Critical thinking and skill development
nodes.grounding_span: makes it harder for people to use their own imagination or to look at what AI gives them in a critical way

nodes.label: Preference for manual ordering despite AI
nodes.grounding_span: I would prefer to do all of my ordering myself

nodes.label: Appreciation for AI in pattern analysis
nodes.grounding_span: I do find AI helpful when looking at what is selling at what time of day

nodes.label: Frustration with AI errors and opacity
nodes.grounding_span: When you get a restock list that tells you to put 2 out of something it shows you only have 1 of, you start to wonder who is running the thing

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: I see a huge value in AI in helping to boost creativity

nodes.label: Concern about AI as crutch
nodes.grounding_span: I also could see it as a crutch that makes it harder for people to use their own imagination

nodes.label: Experience-based manual reasoning — relies on past practice and local knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: I'm old school. I would prefer to do all of my ordering myself because, before technology became so prevalent, I did it all anyway

nodes.label: Systematic cross-referencing — uses AI as starting point then verifies with multiple sources
nodes.grounding_span: It involves looking at reports we can generate that show our high sellers
